title: anthemis pauciloba var. microstephana
intro: Anthemis pauciloba var. microstephana, also known as the Pyrenean chamomile, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis pauciloba var. microstephana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, thanks to its calming effects. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
